message:
test(proptest): expand dataflow from 16 to 35 property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add Value serde roundtrip with float tolerance, JSON type tag validation,
equality/clone tests, get_label, is_stable, node_ids completeness,
propagation_count tracking, NodeId display format, update_source error
handling (NotASource), cycle detection across 2 nodes, DuplicateEdge
rejection, error Display, remove_node errors, sink fire-on-change, sink
unknown node error, merge node count/values/edges preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
